conclusion:
**Error al conectar con la IA.**

Hubo un problema al generar el análisis del mercado para el día de hoy. El error interno es: 404 models/gemini-1.5-flash is not found for API version v1beta, or is not supported for generateContent. Call ModelService.ListModels to see the list of available models and their supported methods.
